'''thasungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbiting|rabbiting]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbiting|rabbiting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thasungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsingith|thæsingith]] || [[word:thæsingij|thæsingij]] || [[word:thæsingish|thæsingish]] || [[word:thæsingi|thæsingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasusunguth|thasusunguth]] || [[word:thasusunguj|thasusunguj]] || [[word:thasusungush|thasusungush]] || [[word:thasusungu|thasusungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasunguth|thasunguth]] || [[word:thasunguj|thasunguj]] || [[word:thasungush|thasungush]] || [[word:thasungu|thasungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasufnguth|thasufnguth]] || [[word:thasufnguj|thasufnguj]] || [[word:thasufngush|thasufngush]] || [[word:thasufnguf|thasufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasunguthu|thasunguthu]] || [[word:thasunguju|thasunguju]] || [[word:thasungushu|thasungushu]] || [[word:thasunguku|thasunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasunguth|thasunguth]] || [[word:thasunguj|thasunguj]] || [[word:thasungush|thasungush]] || [[word:thasungu|thasungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasunguthul|thasunguthul]] || [[word:thasungujul|thasungujul]] || [[word:thasungushul|thasungushul]] || [[word:thasungukul|thasungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasunguthuthu|thasunguthuthu]] || [[word:thasungujuju|thasungujuju]] || [[word:thasungushushu|thasungushushu]] || [[word:thasunguku|thasunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasunguthun|thasunguthun]] || [[word:thasungujun|thasungujun]] || [[word:thasungushun|thasungushun]] || [[word:thasungukun|thasungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasunguthuoro|thasunguthuoro]] || [[word:thasungujuoro|thasungujuoro]] || [[word:thasungushuoro|thasungushuoro]] || [[word:thasungukuoro|thasungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
